honesty: The corpus-era REGISTRATION: every shared number the committed corpus pins across harnesses, in ONE file, so a corpus-growth cycle re-baselines here (with a lineage entry) instead of hunting literals through the test tree.  Numbers are REPRODUCED live by the harnesses that read them -- this file registers, it never overrides a recompute.  Harness-specific micro-pins stay next to their harness.
era: post-merge union era + C3 cycle-03 census-sourced 79-81 (math2001 ch.1 Proofs-by-Calculation 006/004 + ch.2 Proofs-with-Structure 002; linear substitution, linear <= chaining, product identity -- the linear-calculation family nearly exhausted); 73 top-level sources

lineage.note: sources landed in manifest; entered the bench checkpoint at the C2 era run

lineage.era: S4b entrance-predicate sources (67-69, PR #23) merged with C2 census-sourced (67-70)
C3 census-sourced growth (71-74): the second math2001 attempt-candidate batch (divisibility family, sibling to 67-70), certified via the inline-author checkpoint resume

C3 cycle-02 census-sourced growth (75-78): the third math2001 attempt-candidate batch, the chapter-1 LINEAR-CALCULATION family (the ch3 dvd-forall candidates are exhausted; a linear-arithmetic cluster cannot perturb the even/odd macro invariant the dvd batches were shaped around), certified via the inline-author checkpoint resume

C3 cycle-03 census-sourced growth (79-81): the fourth math2001 attempt-candidate batch, CONTINUING the chapter-1/2 LINEAR-CALCULATION family (75-78) and nearly exhausting it -- the remaining in-lexicon calculation candidates are these three (linear substitution a=2b+5,b=3->a=11; linear <= chaining m+3<=2n-1,n<=5->m<=6; product identity ad=bc,cf=de->d(af-be)=0); a linear/product cluster cannot perturb the even/odd macro invariant; ch1 003 refused (vacuous: b^2=2a^2 has no nonzero integer witness), >/>= and exists candidates measured out-of-lexicon; certified via the inline-author checkpoint resume

cluster_key_reregistration.law: baseline = the LEGACY replay on the grown corpus (reproduced live, never assumed); census-of-record = refined + gc_table; accept_max_dl = baseline - 29 (the T3 window-rule regression magnitude, section 11.10); max_macros = the original per-reading proportion (8 at 37 certified)

holdout_transfer_registration.note: PRE-registered (section 13.2) -- NEVER re-registered on corpus growth; reconstruction replays exactly this slice
